race.comment: Tough race. STRUGGLE STREET (5) resumes having been in great form last campaign. She started out in picnic company but kept improving, placing in her past two including in a BM66 in town. She's been jumping out nicely and might just get under the radar of a few here at double-figure odds. MISS COTOLETTA (8) was first up off a short break at Sale when seventh but was only beaten two lengths there in tougher company and can be better for it. She gets a nice run on speed here. NASRAAWY (1) is racing consistently and is suited to the 1000m around here. He'll take catching. ROOM FOR BINGO (4) ran a solid race first up here and should come on from that, her second up record reads well.
